full_text:
23_HRDConsensusProject

Members of the project:

Matilda Salko (2022-currently)

Anni Härkönen (2024-currently)

Fernando Perez (2022-June 2025)

This project implements different HRD testing modalities with the aim of improving clinical HRD testing practices.

The main project components are:

Comparison of FF and FFPE sample based ovaHRDscar results

To enable the use of FFPE samples for research purposes

Relevant data is in folder: L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\23_HRDConsensusProject\01_FFPE_samples

Paired biopsy and tumor samples from IDS patients

To investigate whether performing ovaHRDscar analysis from pre-chemotherapy samples will improve the quality of HRD test results for IDS patients

Relevant data is in folder L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\23_HRDConsensusProject\02_IDS_biopsies

An Oncosys-OVA sub-cohort of PARPi treated patients from before the implementation of clinical HRD testing with ovaHRDscar (09/2022)

To investigate ovaHRDscar results from patients who were treated with PARPi before the availability of clinical HRD testing

Relevant data is in folder L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\23_HRDConsensusProject\03_PARPi_retrospective_cohort

Analysis of prospective Oncosys-OVA patients who have been HRD tested in the clinic with the FF-based, clinical ovaHRDscar test (diagnosed between 09/22-12/24)

Aim is to find out the real-world outcomes of patients treated with PARPi in the first line, and to see how ovaHRDscar performs in the real-world setting

Relevant data is in folder L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\23_HRDConsensusProject\04_Prospective_cohort

ovaHRDcalculation for must of the Oncosys-OVA samples:

To get HRD status in Oncosys-OVA samples

Developed code or analysis utils:

For the ovaHRDscar calculation of samples was used the script `ASCAT3_QCs_ovaHRDscars_onlyTumor.R` that is in this repository:

https://github.com/farkkilab/SNParray_ovaHRDscar_QC

For the analysis and compiling of results have been used scripts deposited in the next Github repository:

https://github.com/farkkilab/oncosys_ova_snp_array

The results and raw data for all SNP array analysis are in this folder:

L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Raw_and_intermediante_files_fernando\Oncosys_and_others\

Other files for analysis of SNP arrays and calculation of ovaHRDscar are in this folder.

Replication timing file for ASCAT: L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Utils\GCcontent_GSAv3.txt

Cluster file for GenomeStudio: 
L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Utils\Cluster_file\

Manifest file for GenomeStudio generated in Tartu unit: 
L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Utils\Manifest_Tartu\

Presentations with results:

The presentations are in this GDrive folder in the Presentations folder.

Also there are presentations in the next folder in L-drive:

L-drive/Projects/23_HRDConsensusProject/00_Project presentations/

Project log

Notes about previous analysis from 2022-2024

All results, raw SNP-array data and intermediate data have been stored in the folder:

L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Raw_and_intermediante_files_fernando\Oncosys_and_others\

There is a folder for each batch of samples analyzed, each folder has as name the date when the SNP-array raw data was generated per sample. Each folder has the same general structure inside. Take a look at the README.txt file in the Oncosys_and_others folder to get to know more about this.

All the results have been compiled by Anastasia and Matilda in to the table:

L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\SNP-Arrays_ONCOSYS-OVA_JointTable_Anastasiya-Fernando_UPD_2023-02-19_MS.xlsx

In early 2024, we updated the ASCAT version from version 2 to version 3.1.2. ASCAT is the software for allele imbalance detection (also known as allele specific copy number detection). For this, all intermediate files, BAF and LogR ratio files per run in previous folders, were merged in an unique folder:

L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Raw_and_intermediante_files_fernando\Oncosys_and_others\All_samples_merged_2024\ The files in this folder were then used to regenerate ovaHRDscar of previous runs. Now in future analysis all the runs have been done using the ASCAT version 3.1.2.

Comparison of FF and FFPE samples

Some of the resultant files are here:

L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\For_analysis\

The script developed by Fernando for this comparisons is this: https://github.com/farkkilab/oncosys_ova_snp_array/blob/main/003_Purity_pathologist_ASCAT_concordance_and_QCs.Rmd

And also this:
https://github.com/farkkilab/oncosys_ova_snp_array/blob/main/002_FFPE-FF_concordance_and_QC_analysis.Rmd

To increase the concodance of FFPE and FF samples in ovaHRDscar values, we also tried to change the parameters of ASCAT to give a range of possible purity based on pathologist observations. This was done by adjusting the next function ascat.runAscat and adding the parameter max_purity in the script:

https://github.com/farkkilab/SNParray_ovaHRDscar_QC/blob/main/ASCAT3_QCs_ovaHRDscars_onlyTumor.R

The results did not increased the concordance notoriously, just in five samples these results are reported in this slide: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1YsVOgr98WPU98DCpBGCXitwKk31NduwnslIHIEEnsBk/edit?slide=id.g2b4fc70e782_0_18#slide=id.g2b4fc70e782_0_18

Analysis of PARPi samples in Tartu - May 2025

A batch of 94 samples were sent to Tartu for SNP-array analysis using the Illumina GSA v3. The results from the genotyping unit in Tartu were deposited in a server by them. The access to the server was shared in an email to Matilda. The Tartu’s genomic unit included a new cluster file and a new manifest file, because this SNP array version had a bit less SNPs than the ones used before in FIMM-Helsinki.

The SNP-array data and cluster and manifest files were downloaded and organized in folders by Fernando. The data was analysed using the same GenomeStudio protocol, with the new cluster and manifest files proportioned by Tartu. The new pipeline for SNP-array analysis was then executed (https://github.com/farkkilab/SNParray_ovaHRDscar_QC). The same metrics file and replication timing was used for ASCAT as the one used before with the SNP-array from FIMM-Helsinki, which is the same version but with a bit more SNPs. No errors were reported in ASCAT using these files.

The results were deposited in the folder:

L:\ltdk_farkkila\Projects\SNP-arrays_results\Raw_and_intermediante_files_fernando\Oncosys_and_others\20250515_Tartu_PARP\

The location of cluster and manifest files shared by Tartu are listed in the above section (Developed code or analysis utils).

The inspection of results by Matilda were summarised in a presentation that is here:

L:/ltdk_farkkila/Projects/23_HRDConsensusProject/00_Project_presentations/HRD consensus project- PARPi cohort 19.5.2025.pptx

The code used for making the plots and figures that are shown in the presentation is stored here: ___
